author: Markiplier
text:
YOU WILL DECIDE MY FATE
It's time to enter the frozen wasteland once again! This time for a very special birthday celebration in Frostpunk 2 where all of you will make (almost) every decision for me! Will we survive the winter apocalypse?
Play the Game ► https://store.steampowered.com/app/1601580/Frostpunk_2/

LISTEN TO DISTRACTIBLE ►► https://open.spotify.com/show/2X40qLyoj1wQ2qE5FVpA7x
MY COMFY CLOTHES ► https://cloakbrand.com/
